{{ site.Params.brand }}
{{- $sections := where site.Sections "Params.sidebar" "ne" false -}} {{- $sections := $sections.ByWeight -}} {{- $primary := first 3 $sections -}} {{- $secondary := after 3 $sections -}} {{ with $primary }}
{{ i18n "footer_docs" }}
    {{ range . }}
  • {{ .Title }}
    • {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ with $secondary }}
{{ i18n "footer_reference" }}
    {{ range . }}
  • {{ .Title }}
    • {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ if and site.Params.show_footer_project site.Params.repoURL }}
{{ i18n "footer_project" }}
  • {{ i18n "footer_releases" }}
  • {{ i18n "footer_issues" }}
{{ end }}
© {{ now.Year }} {{ site.Params.author }} {{ i18n "footer_built_with" }}
